conversion: Keras VGG19 transfer-learning model converted to ONNX and statically quantized with QDQ INT8

rejected_candidate.reason: Accuracy was too low to install.

limitations: The source repository does not declare a model or dataset license; use these weights for local evaluation only.
The supplied photo is duplicated in source validation data and cannot demonstrate generalization.
The model has no healthy or out-of-domain class and cannot independently confirm that an image is a diseased banana plant.
